description:
Offered: Spring
The capstone course allows students to work either individually or as a group, synthesizing and applying what they have learned in their earlier Digital Media Innovation coursework as part of an ambitious semester-long project in collaboration with community partners. Cross-listed with ENGL 4800
Prerequisite(s): DMI 4799 or ENGL 4799
Note: Credit can only be awarded for one of ENGL 4800 or COMM 4800 or DMI 4800. This course is restricted to students in the Digital Media Innovation program.
